mapper.select: SELECT parsed_data FROM ai_career_plan.resume_analysis_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT scores FROM ai_career_plan.resume_analysis_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM ai_career_plan.resume_analysis_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
